.callout[data-callout=\"note\"] > .callo.--bases-embed-border-color: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(2, 122, 255) 25%, color-mix(in srgb, hsl(238, 60%, 11%) 25%, #000) 50%)
.callout[data-callout=\"note\"] > .callo.--bases-table-border-color: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(2, 122, 255) 25%, color-mix(in srgb, hsl(238, 60%, 11%) 25%, #000) 50%)
.callout[data-callout=\"note\"] > .callo.--table-border-color: color-mix(in srgb, rgb(2, 122, 255) 25%, color-mix(in srgb, hsl(238, 60%, 11%) 25%, #000) 50%)

.file-embed.background: color(srgb 0.022 0.0242 0.088) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: color(srgb 0.0176 0.01936 0.0704) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: color(srgb 0.011 0.0121 0.044) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background:
color-mix(in srgb, color-mix(
    in srgb,
    hsl(238, 60%, 11%) 90%,
    hsl(255, 100%, 80%)
  ) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(color-mix(
    in srgb,
    hsl(238, 60%, 11%) 90%,
    hsl(255, 100%, 80%)
  ), color-mix(in srgb, color-mix(
    in srgb,
    hsl(238, 60%, 11%) 90%,
    hsl(255, 100%, 80%)
  ) 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background:
color-mix(in srgb, color-mix(
    in srgb,
    hsl(238, 60%, 11%) 90%,
    hsl(255, 100%, 80%)
  ) 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(color-mix(
    in srgb,
    hsl(238, 60%, 11%) 90%,
    hsl(255, 100%, 80%)
  ), color-mix(in srgb, color-mix(
    in srgb,
    hsl(238, 60%, 11%) 90%,
    hsl(255, 100%, 80%)
  ) 65%, transparent))
body.--tab-switcher-menubar-background: linear-gradient(to top, color-mix(in srgb, hsl(238, 60%, 11%) 40%, #000), transparent)
body.background: color(srgb 0.011 0.0121 0.044) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: color(srgb 0.011 0.0121 0.044) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
